description: Letter from Ya’aqov b. Salman al-Hariri, from a port city in Syria (maybe Ladikiya), to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. Around 1050. The writer describes the hardships of the ship’s journey from Alexandria, when for 8 days the passengers had to draw water that entered the ship and damaged the linen that was there. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #660) VMR
description_he: מכתב מיעקב בן סלמן אל-חריר, מנמל בסוריה, לנהראי בן ניסים, פוסטאט, כ-1050, על סבל בנסיעת הספינה ונזק לפשתן
